name: CORCEPT THERAPEUTICS INC
business: We are a commercial-stage company engaged in the discovery and development of medications to treat severe endocrinologic, oncologic, metabolic and neurologic disorders by modulating the effects of the hormone cortisol. Since 2012, we have marketed Korlym in the United States for the treatment of patients suffering from hypercortisolism (also known as Cushing's syndrome). In June 2024, we made an authorized generic version of Korlym available for the same indication.
sellsTo: physicians caring for patients with hypercortisolism

exposures.sentence: We are a commercial-stage company engaged in the discovery and development of medications to treat severe endocrinologic, oncologic, metabolic and neurologic disorders by modulating the effects of the hormone cortisol.

catalysts.event: FDA issued Complete Response Letter for relacorilant (hypercortisolism)
catalysts.sentence: On December 30, 2025, the FDA issued a Complete Response Letter (CRL) declining to approve relacorilant.

catalysts.event: NDA submission for relacorilant plus nab-paclitaxel in platinum-resistant ovarian cancer
catalysts.sentence: In July 2025, we submitted an NDA seeking approval to market relacorilant plus the chemotherapy medication nab-paclitaxel as a treatment for patients with platinum-resistant ovarian cancer in the United States.

catalysts.event: PDUFA date for relacorilant ovarian cancer NDA
catalysts.sentence: In September 2025, the FDA accepted our NDA for filing and assigned a Prescription Drug User Fee Act (PDUFA) date of July 11, 2026.

catalysts.event: BELLA Part A completed enrollment (platinum-resistant ovarian cancer)
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, Part A completed enrollment of 95 patients with platinum-resistant ovarian cancer.
In December 2025, we initiated a Phase 2 trial, TRIDENT, with a planned enrollment of 50 patients with pancreatic cancer.

catalysts.event: STELLA Phase 2 trial expected to initiate (cervical cancer)
catalysts.sentence: In collaboration with the Paris-based academic research cooperative ARCAGY-GINECO, we will initiate, in the first quarter of 2026, a Phase 2 trial, STELLA, in 50 patients with cervical cancer.

catalysts.event: Expected start of pivotal Phase 3 trial for dazucorilant (ALS)
catalysts.sentence: Following completion of this study, we expect to start a pivotal Phase 3 trial in 2026.
